mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsRsltIdxDao.selectList */ select bsns_cd , rslt_idx_id , rslt_idx_nm , std_idx , rslt_idx_type_cd from uspt_bsns_rslt_idx where bsns_cd = #{bsnsCd}

/** UsptBsnsRsltIdxDao.selectRsltIdxIemList */ select rslt_idx_detail_iem_id , detail_iem_nm , iem_unit_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@UNIT_CODE_GROUP}', iem_unit_cd) as iem_unit from uspt_bsns_rslt_idx_detail_iem where rslt_idx_id = #{rsltIdxId}

/** UsptBsnsRsltIdxDao.selectStdIdxIemList */ select rslt_idx_std_iem_id , std_iem_nm , iem_unit_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@UNIT_CODE_GROUP}', iem_unit_cd) as iem_unit from uspt_bsns_rslt_idx_std_iem where rslt_idx_id = #{rsltIdxId}
